application.desc: GROBID - A machine learning software for extracting information from scholarly documents

disease Condition Suggested Contingency measures Early season drought (delayed onset) Major Farming situation Normal Crop / Cropping system Change in crop / cropping system including variety Agronomic measures Remarks on Implementation
figure.figDesc: The crop needs to be trained over low trellis of 1.5 m high above the ground • After 85 to 90 days of sowing, older leaves near the bottom of the vine are to be pruned • Timely control of downy mildew disease

row.cell: 2.0 Strategies for weather related contingencies 2.1 Drought 2.1.1 Rainfed situation Condition Early season drought (delayed onset) Major Farming situation Normal Crop / Cropping system Delay by 2 weeks 3 rd week of June Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Cauliflower Okra Cucurbits (Cucumber, ridge gourd, bottle gourd, bitter gourd etc.) Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Cauliflower Okra Cucurbits (Cucumber, Ridge gourd, Bottle gourd, Bitter gourd etc.) Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Delay by 4 weeks 1 st week of July Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Cauliflower land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red Vegetables Cauliflower soils Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Cauliflower loamy soils Wheat/ Mustard/ Red & laterite soils, undulated Aman rice-Fallow moderately deep Aman rice-land. Shallow to soils, undulated Fallow Cauliflower Okra Cucurbits (Cucumber, Ridge gourd, Bottle gourd, Bitter gourd etc.) Okra Okra Cucurbits (Cucumber, Ridge gourd, Bottle gourd, Bitter gourd etc.) Suggested Contingency measures Change in crop / cropping system including variety Agronomic measures No change • Dry seeding of rice/ drum seeding. • Timely weed control. -do--do-No change. Prefer varieties like Early Kunwari, Pusa Early Synthetic, Synthetic 78-1 • Raising of seed bed under transparent plastic cover • Spray the 15 days old seedlings with the starter solution of ammonium sulphate (50g/10litres of water) • Transplant healthy seedlings of 35-40 days old • Three foliar sprays of 0.3% borax after 20, 35 and 50 days after transplanting No change. Prefer varieties like Arka Anamika, Arka Abhay, Pusa A-4, VRO-6, Azad Krishna (OP), Mahyco-12, No-152 (Hybrid) • Soaking the seeds in 0.2% Bavistin over night to protect the seedlings from wilt disease; • 4-5 foliar sprays of Imidacloprid (3.5 ml/ 10 l or Thiamethoxam (3.5 ml/ 10 l) to control whitefly No change. Prefer local cultivars • Prepare mounds in the furrow for sowing of seeds • Application of 150-20-50 PPM Ethrel (1.5-2.0 ml/10 l of water), 400 ppm (4 ml/10 l of water), maleic hydrazide twice, first at two true leaves stage of plants i.e. 15 days after sowing and subsequently repeated 7 days after helps in increasing the yield • The crop needs to be trained over low trellis of 1.5 m high above the ground • After 85 to 90 days of sowing, older leaves near the bottom of the vine are to be pruned • Timely control of downy mildew disease No change • Transplant 2-3 seedlings/hill • Timely weed control.. -do--do-No change. Prefer varieties like Early Kunwari, Pusa Early Synthetic, Synthetic 78-1 • Raising of seed bed under transparent plastic cover • Spray the 15 days old seedlings with the starter solution of ammonium sulphate (50g/10litres of water) • Transplant healthy seedlings of 35-40 days old • Three foliar sprays of 0.3% borax after 20, 35 and 50 days after transplanting No change. Prefer varieties like Arka Anamika, Arka Abhay, Pusa A-4, VRO-6, Azad Krishna (OP), Mahyco-12, No-152 (Hybrid) • Soaking the seeds in 0.2% Bavistin over night to protect the seedlings from wilt disease; • 4-5 foliar sprays of Imidacloprid (3.5 ml/ 10 l or Thiamethoxam (3.5 ml/ 10 l) to control whitefly No change. Prefer local cultivars • Prepare mounds in the furrow for sowing of seeds • Application of 150-20-50 PPM Ethrel (1.5-2.0 ml/10 l of water), 400 ppm (4 ml/10 l of water), maleic hydrazide twice, first at two true leaves stage of plants i.e. 15 days after sowing and subsequently repeated 7 days after helps in increasing the yield high above the ground • After 85 to 90 days of sowing, older leaves near the • Timely control of downy mildew disease No change • Transplanting 4-5 seedlings/hill • Timely weed control. -do--do-No change Transplant 3-4 seedlings/hill -do--do-No change. Prefer varieties like Pusa No change. Delay by 6 weeks 3 rd week of July Early season drought Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils soils, undulated land. Grow maize, Ground nut, black gram in high land situation. -do-No change. Prefer varieties like Hisar-1, No change. Prefer varieties like Green Express, Green 621, (Hybrid) No change. Prefer varieties Muktakeshi, duration rice( Raasi, • Transplant 4-5 aged seedlings per hill • Follow Dapog & SRI method. -do-days after transplanting • Raising of seed bed under transparent plastic cover; Khitesh, Kiron, Bhupen) Normal Crop/ cropping system Crop management Soil nutrient & moisture conservation Linkage with Seed farms, Department of Agriculture, NSC, WBSC, BCKVV for supply of seed measures • Raising of seed bed under transparent plastic cover; • After transplanting two foliar sprays of 0.5% ZnSO 4 and in upland & medium land Aman rice-Fallow • Take up gap filling either with Apply 30-50 kg N /ha after relief of drought. • Spray the 15 days old seedlings with the starter solution BCB-11, BCB-30, single spray of 0.15% CuSO 4 increase yield and quality situation available nursery or by splitting the of ammonium sulphate (50g/10litres of water); • Transplant healthy seedlings of 35-40 days old ; • Three foliar sprays of 0.3% borax after 20, 35 and 50 days after transplanting; No change. Prefer varieties like Arka Anamika, Arka Abhay, Pusa A-4, VRO-6, Azad Krishna (OP), Mahyco-12, No-152 (Hybrid) • Soaking the seeds in 0.2% Bavistin over night to protect the seedlings from wilt disease; • 4-5 foliar sprays of Imidacloprid (3.5 ml/ 10 l or Thiamethoxam (3.5 ml/ 10 l) to control whitefly No change. Prefer varieties Muktakeshi, BCB-11, BCB-30; Bhangar, Patakata • Raising of seed bed under transparent plastic cover; • After transplanting two foliar sprays of 0.5% ZnSO 4 and single spray of 0.15% CuSO 4 increase yield and quality of fruits. No change. Grow maize, Ground nut, black gram in high land situation. • Transplant 3-4 aged seedlings per hill • Follow Dapog & SRI method. -do--do-No change. figure.head: Condition Suggested contingency measures Mid season drought (long dry spell, consecutive 2 weeks rainless (>2.5 mm) period) Major Farming situation Normal Crop/ cropping system Crop management Soil nutrient & moisture conservation measures
figure.figDesc: Shallow water in ponds due to insufficient rains/inflowProposed for excavation of earth from the pond so that water can retain during drought and supply of water in to the pond from tube well / river etc.

row.cell: (hillocks, gravelly situation) soils, undulated Major Farming Normal Aman rice-fallow Change in condition to loosen and condition to loosen and • Plan for land preparation to sow the Agronomic measures water body. • Supplemental irrigation -do-Drought -Irrigated situation Suggested Contingency measures optimum soil moisture optimum soil moisture before harvest building of high embankment and proper management of the said breaks.

Vegetative stage Condition Mid season drought (long dry spell) At flowering/ fruiting stage Condition Major Farming Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils Major Farming situation Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils land. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils situation Normal Crop/ Mustard/ Vegetables Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Aman rice-Fallow Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables Normal Crop/ cropping system Aman rice-fallow Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables Aman rice-fallow Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables borer. Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables Suggested contingency measures • Take up gap filling either with available nursery or by splitting the tillers from the surviving hills • Interculture / weeding • Supplemental irrigation. -do--do--do--do--do-Suggested contingency measures Crop management • Supplemental irrigation • Plan for land preparation to sow the fodder crops like maize and sorghum If the damage is severe, prepare land for rabi vegetables • Supplemental irrigation • Plan for land preparation to sow the fodder crops like maize and sorghum If the damage is severe, prepare land for rabi vegetables fodder crops like maize and sorghum If the damage is severe, prepare land for rabi vegetables cropping system Crop management Rabi Crop planning Apply 30-50 kg N /ha after relief of drought. -do--do--do--do--do-Soil nutrient & moisture conservation measures • Spray 2% urea or DAP • Top dressing of 50 kg N/ha after the relief of dry spell • Need based pesticide application -do--do--do--do-Terminal drought (Early withdrawal of monsoon) Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-Fallow Supplemental irrigation with farm pond water / other sources Sowing of linseed/ Khesari as paira crop Aman rice-Wheat/ Mustard/ Vegetables -do-• Sowing of short duration rapreseed varieties like Sanjucta, Asech, B-54, Jhanti • Sowing of lentil / wheat / mustard/ vegetables Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Aman rice-Fallow -do-Sowing of linseed/ Khesari as paira crop Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Sowing of short duration rapreseed varieties like Sanjucta, Asech, B-54, Jhanti • Sowing of lentil / wheat / mustard/ vegetables Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils Aman rice-fallow -do-Sowing of linseed/ Khesari as paira crop Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Sowing of short duration rapreseed varieties like Sanjucta, Asech, B-54, Jhanti • Sowing of lentil / wheat / mustard/ vegetables Condition Suggested Contingency measures Major Farming situation Normal Crop/cropping system Change in crop/cropping system Agronomic measures Remarks on Implementation Delayed release of water in canals due to low rainfall Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-fallow No change. Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety. • Adopt SRI method • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Linkage with NFSM, ISOPOM, NREGS Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Aman rice-fallow -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils Aman rice-fallow -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard situation Crop/cropping system crop/cropping system Implementation Limited release of water in canals due to low rainfall Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-fallow No change. Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety. • Adopt SRI method • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Linkage with NFSM, ISOPOM, NREGS Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Aman rice-fallow -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Shallow to moderately deep loamy soils Aman rice-fallow -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables -do-• Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard Condition Suggested Contingency measures Major Farming situation Normal Crop/cropping system Change in crop/cropping system Agronomic measures Remarks on Implementation Insufficient groundwater recharge due to low rainfall Any other condition Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Shallow to moderately deep coarse loamy fine loamy soils (hillocks, gravelly situation) Aman rice-fallow No change. Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety. • Adopt SRI method • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed Management. • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land Linkage with NFSM, ISOPOM, NREGS. aerate the soil and to control weeds aerate the soil and to (ii) Changes in water quality Water and soil quality tests suggested Proper management in ponds for Proper disinfection of water and control weeds from time to time. soil and water as per the test report. maintenance of water temperature and • Spray Mancozeb (0.25 %) to Okra Spraying the crop with -do--do-plankton quantity. control fungal diseases Drain excess water Cypermethrin @ 0.1% to (iii) Any other Nil Nil Nil Horticulture Cauliflower • Drain excess water • Three sprays of 0.1% Ammonium molybdate 15, 30 and 45 days after transplanting. • Drain excess water • Blanching i.e. covering the curd through tying the outer leaves up over the curd improve curd Early harvesting control fruit borer. B. Aquaculture Large leaves are trimmed away leaving only sufficient jacket leaves to protect the curd from bruising and other mechanical injury in transport. Brinjal Drain excess water Clipping off the infested Immediate harvesting (i) Control of pond water quality Suggested for disinfection of pond -parameters and maintenance of water through liming and periodic shoot by brinjal fruit and optimum level of planktons (fish netting to assess the biomass. shoot borer at regular interval and spraying the crop with food) in the pond through proper for rabi wheat / mustard Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety to follow the crop sequences of Rice -khesari / linseed / pulses / oilseed colour and quality. Cartap hydrochloride @ 1 g/l fertilization (if required) • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management of water / Spinosad @ (ii) Impact of salt load build up in Not applicable Not applicable Not applicable Condition-Heavy rainfall with high speed winds in a short span Rice Drain excess water Drain excess water • Immediate harvesting • Arrange for drying of the produce in airy sheds (0.15ml/l), 0.25% Carbaryl or ponds / change in water quality (No saline water nearby) (No saline water nearby) (No saline water nearby) • Spray 2% brine solution to prevent premature germination in the field • Allow the crop to dry 0.05% Endosulfan at the (iii) Any other Nil Nil Nil early flowering stage and NA after harvesting of fruits during bearing stage is very 2) Floods (mustard / rape seed) Red & laterite soils, undulated land. Moderately deep to deep coarse loamy to fine loamy red soils Aman rice-fallow No change. Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety. completely before harvesting effective 3. Cyclone / Tsunami • Adopt SRI method • Dry the grain to proper Condition-Outbreak of pests and diseases due to unseasonal rains 4. Heat wave and cold wave NA • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water crops like maize and sorghum or prepare land for rabi wheat / mustard Aman rice-wheat/ mustard/ vegetables Prefer direct sowing of short duration rice variety to follow the crop sequences of Rice -khesari / linseed / pulses / oilseed (mustard / rape seed) • Adopt alternate wetting and drying upto primordial initiation stage to save water • Better weed management Cauliflower Drain excess water Cabbage Drain excess water Spraying the crop with sticker to control cabbage 15-20 days interval anthracnose Cypermethrin @ 0.1% with -do-the control of thrips and mites at interval for the control of dieback or -do-g/litre/ Prlopergite @1 g/litre for removal of the infected twigs at 10 days prevent curd blight. 1ml/litre/ Diafenthiuron @ 1 0.1% followed by 0.3% Blitox after 10 days interval to Chilli Spraying of Prophenophos @ Spray the crop with Hexaconazole -(0.5g/lt) with sticker at spray for the control of fruit fly. (0.2%) or Difenconazole baiting and 20 liters of water for bait (0.25 %)/ Chlorothalonil control downy mildew disease. is mixed with 2 litres of water for poison (0.3%) or Mancozeb at 10 days interval effectively + 20 g yeast hydrolysate. This mixture Copper-oxychloride or Metalaxyl-Mancozeb Malathion 50% WP with 500 g molasses • Spraying the crop with marketing or Cyamoxanil-Mancozeb Bait is prepared by mixing 20 g • Drain excess water Immediate harvesting Maintain optimum moisture before Cucurbits Two sprays of 0.25% Fosetyl Al -Apply poison bait. • If rice crop cannot be taken, select fodder Horticulture after sowing at 10 days interval control fruit borer • Better weed Management. moisture content before insecticides starting from 20 days Cypermethrin @ 0.1% to 0.1% to control fruit borer bagging and storage Okra Four spraying of systemic Spraying the crop with Spraying the crop with Cypermethrin @ -a based on forewarning wherever available

analytic.title: Flood: Not applicable 2.4 Extreme events: Heat wave / Cold wave/Frost/ Hailstorm /Cyclone-Not applicable 2.5 Contingent strategies for Livestock
